_source: IAEA GSG-1 (Classification of Radioactive Waste, 2009) — simplified for sim.
_notes: These are order-of-magnitude class boundaries for sim purposes only.
Real classification depends on radionuclide-specific clearance/exemption levels (GSR Part 3 Schedule I) and on heat generation for the ILW/HLW boundary.
VLLW upper bound is set from clearance levels of common LWR nuclides (Cs-137, Co-60).
ILW lower bound aligns with the conventional surface-dose criterion (>2 mSv/h on contact for un-shielded items).

scrutiny._comment: Items classified below this confidence get a scrutiny flag and are routed to the HPGe drum scanner for re-classification.

shielding._comment: Worker-dose model assumes ILW in transit must be in shielded cask; LLW does not. Misclassifying ILW as LLW => exposure event.
